home_content.section_title: Buy a Tiny House in Belgium
home_content.paragraph_1: Looking for a tiny house in Belgium? Tiny House Heavens is your specialist in modular tiny houses for the Benelux. Our collection of 18 unique models offers a solution for every lifestyle, from compact 13 m² studios to spacious 112 m² family homes with multiple bedrooms.
home_content.paragraph_2: Every tiny house is built with high-quality materials: a steel undercarriage, timber frame construction and 150-200 mm insulation. Choose from three finishing levels — House Kit for self-builders, Basic for a fully finished home, or Optima for a turnkey experience.
home_content.paragraph_3: Sustainable, affordable and energy-efficient: our modular homes combine Belgian craftsmanship with modern design. Whether you are looking for a starter home, want to place an annex in your garden or choose a fully autonomous house — we guide you from design to delivery.
